overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through Night City during a heavy rainstorm at night. The vehicle navigates wet neon-lit streets, distinctive intersections with yellow crosswalks, open plazas with orange pavement, and elevated highways with massive digital billboards and industrial overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial downtown street with holographic ads

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through rain-soaked neon-lit city streets, maintaining moderate speed

entered.detail: bright pink and blue illuminated advertisements on building facades
floating 3D holographic displays above street level
tall glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows
rain-slicked black asphalt reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a vehicle driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night. Neon billboards and holographic advertisements illuminate the wet asphalt while futuristic glass buildings line the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with distinctive golden geometric building

events.description: navigating through intersection with bold yellow striped crosswalk markings
passing distinctive golden geometric building facade on the left

agents.ego_description: making a right turn at the intersection while slowing down, then accelerating through the plaza approach

notable_agents.action: red car ahead slowing for the intersection and maintaining distance

entered.detail: building with distinctive yellow honeycomb geometric pattern facade
bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right at a large intersection marked by distinctive yellow crosswalk stripes, passing a building with a striking golden geometric facade on the left. The scene opens into a wider plaza area as the vehicle accelerates away from the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with massive overhead digital screens

events.description: entering open plaza area with distinctive orange pavement sections
accelerating onto elevated highway section passing under digital billboards

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the highway while passing under massive curved digital displays

entered.detail: massive curved digital displays spanning across the highway showing advertisements
distinctive rust-colored road surface sections in the plaza transition area

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a wide plaza with distinctive orange pavement sections before accelerating onto an elevated highway. Massive curved digital screens span overhead displaying bright advertisements while the road stretches forward into the rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway with metal overpasses and tunnel sections

events.description: entering industrial zone with heavy metal overpass structures and girders
lighting shifts to artificial sources as entering covered highway section with reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed through industrial highway section with heavy rain and overpass coverage, navigating between other vehicles

notable_agents.action: black SUV overtaking on the left side of the vehicle

entered.detail: industrial steel girders and concrete support columns spanning the highway
tall concrete walls with integrated neon lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into an industrial highway zone with heavy metal overpass structures and concrete sound barriers. The lighting becomes more artificial and moody as the vehicle drives under covered sections, with rain continuing to streak across the windshield while other vehicles navigate the wet road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis that transitions from neon-lit city streets to a moody industrial highway. It begins by navigating wet asphalt lined with holographic advertisements and futuristic glass buildings, before turning right at a large intersection marked by distinctive yellow crosswalks and a golden geometric facade. As the vehicle accelerates, the scene opens into a wide plaza with orange pavement sections that leads directly onto an elevated highway beneath massive, curved digital screens. The environment then shifts into an industrial zone characterized by heavy metal overpasses and concrete sound barriers, where the lighting becomes more artificial as the vehicle drives under covered sections amidst the streaking rain.
